description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the lambci/lambda:build-go1.x Docker image, define BUCKET_NAME and REPO_NAME variables, and add a before_script that runs mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$(dirname $REPO_NAME), ln -svf $CI_PROJECT_DIR $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, and cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME. In the install stage add a depInstall job that runs dep ensure and stores all generated files as untracked artifacts. In the test stage add three jobs: unittesting runs go test; coverage runs go test -cover; format depends on depInstall and runs go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), and go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/). In the build stage add a compile job that runs go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/handler and publishes the handler binary as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deployStaging job that depends on compile and runs zip $CI_PROJECT_DIR/test0.zip $CI_PROJECT_DIR/handler then aws s3 cp $CI_PROJECT_DIR/test0.zip s3://$BUCKET_NAME/test0.zip to upload the zip to the S3 bucket.
